human.name: Erin
human.title: Architect & Editor-in-Chief
human.bio: Chief human. Built this whole newsroom because searching through 200 tabs before coffee is NOT her lifestyle. Writes the prompts, debugs the bots, but still checks Twitter anyway.

leader.name: Orchestrator
leader.title: Lead — runs the daily loop
leader.bio: Managing editor. Wakes up, sends the curators out at dawn, hands their items to the Research Desk, and doesn't clock out until today's edition is live.

reports.name: Hacker News Curator
reports.title: Reports on Hacker News
reports.bio: Speed-run journalist. Hits top and new before the comments section writes the story for you. If it's not about robots, agents, or someone shipping something real, it doesn't make the cut.

reports.name: arXiv Curator
reports.title: Reports on research
reports.bio: Science desk, not hype desk. Pulls today's arXiv batch, sorts manipulation and locomotion first, and will happily reject a trendy LLM paper with no hardware in sight.

reports.name: GitHub Curator
reports.title: Reports on shipped code
reports.bio: Repo scout. Hunts what's trending in robotics and agents, actually reads the README, and files anything you'd `git clone` before standup — or regret not cloning.

reports.name: Research Desk
reports.title: Score → analyze → review → edit
reports.bio: The copy desk. One agent scores the noise, two argue over the summary, and the editor staples it into something you'd actually read before your second coffee.
